subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and beseemeth the Creator of all possibilities, Who hath made utterance the Dawning-Place of wisdom, will and knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد موجد امکان را لایق و سزا که بیان را مطلع حکمت و اراده و علم فرمود اوست
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
